nodes.context: Loosely organized gangs of street children, teenagers and youths operating in major Nigerian cities, involved in extortion, drug sales, and informal security.
Informally structured group of young pickpockets based in Lagos and Ibadan from 1920-1940, involved in theft and protection rackets.
Group of unlicensed guides for servicemen during WWII, involved in duping students and linking to prostitution in Lagos.
Rival drug sellers based in Central Lagos, targeted by Area boys.

edges.evidence_quote: Groups of area boys have been known to raid rival, Igbo drug sellers based in Central Lagos.
edges.context: Area boys raid and attack Igbo drug sellers in Central Lagos.
